docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,143.55 FILED BY CSAA EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ GLORIA S. VASQUEZ NICACIO F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-05-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ GLORIA S.
